title: The Unimaginative
content:
Each form of beauty's but the new disguise
    Of thoughts more beautiful than forms can be;
    Sceptics, who search with unanointed eyes,
    Never the Earth's wild fairy-dance shall see.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "The Unimaginative", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
